title: Body Camera Modpack
description: Body camera + realistic weapons and sound. It's all in this modpack!
body:
# ABOUT: **Body camera + realistic weapons and sound. It's all in this modpack!**

### SCREENSHOT: ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wWu2AB2Z/images/4ae0407fcd85de29cec89ef4cb3bac891fb1ab3e.png) ## LIST OF MODS:
Expand ### Features: - [**[TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero**](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero/version/1.0.2) - Camera Overhaul - [**Body Camera Shader**](https://modrinth.com/shader/body-camera-shader/version/1.2.1) - Sound Physics Remastered - Simple Voice Chat ### Optimization: - Sodium - Lithium - Sodium Extra - Reese's Sodium Options - Enhanced Block Entities - ImmediatelyFast - Entity Culling - FerriteCore - ModernFix - fast-ip-ping ### Other: - Fabric API - Iris Shaders - Mod Menu - Cloth Config API - Forge Config API Port - Forge Config Screens - Motschen's Better Leaves - Transparent GUI and HUD - Translations for Sodium
## LINKS: - [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh) - [Telegram](https://t.me/LoLip_p_Community) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lolip_p) ## DEMO VIDEO
